subcodes.title: Ziyarat-i-Shah-'Abdu'l-'Azim
subcodes.first_line: Peace be upon him whom God hath singled out through Muhammad, His Beloved, Whom He chose from the inmost realm of pre-existence above all created beings; and peace be upon him whom God hath chosen through 'Alí, His Friend, Whom He fashioned for His own Self and made supreme over all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو المعبود المحمود المقصود. السلام علی من اختصه الله بمحمد حبیبه الذی استخلصه من بحبوحة القدم علی سائر الممکنات والسلام علی من اصطفاه الله بعلی ولیه الذی اصطنعه لنفسه و جعله مهیمناً علی کل الموجودات
subcodes.subjects: @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @Imam Husayn, @law of pilgrimage, @station of the Manifestation of God
